utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with subitems and monthly costs for each component (costs included). Property_coverage is present but marked 'Not applicable' with no costs (not fully specified). Travel_coverage is present with a plan and cost; includes extra details (counts as fully specified with costs). Additional_services is present with services and monthly costs. Total_budget is present but only provides a single monthly figure without a detailed breakdown by category; however, some category costs are itemized above. The requirement states 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'—annual cost and a full breakdown are missing, so this is not fully specified. Therefore, items fully specified with all details: health_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services. Not fully specified: property_coverage, total_budget.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Physical health selects HealthFirst Standard Plan, which in primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 7. Mental health selects LifeFirst Standard Plan, which in primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 8. Preventive care selects Preventive Care Package add-on, which is listed under health_enhancement_services with rating 8. Travel coverage selects LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan; in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 7 and matches the name. Additional services include Premium Insurance Membership at €20/month, which appears in general_services as Premium Insurance Membership with rating 10. The Family Insurance Concierge at €50/month is not present in the ground-truth ratings dataset, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted. Property coverage is not applicable, so nothing to map there.
